tracks.meaning: a numerical or algebraic symbol or representation, or the value it denotes
a diagram, chart, or illustration used to explain or clarify information
the human form or body, especially when considered in terms of appearance or shape
a person of a specified kind, whether admirable or contemptible
to determine, calculate, or work out something by thinking
to estimate or assess the likely cost, value, or outcome of something
a carved or cast representation of a person in stone or metal, especially a full-length one
a woman's small ornamental object or representation used as a charm or decoration
